title: Dhammapada 11-12: Old Age
description: The Buddha on aging, death, and the urgency of awakening while there is still time.
introduction: The Buddha on aging, death, and the urgency of awakening while there is still time.

translation.original_text: ko nu hāso kim ānando niccaṃ pajjalite sati | andhakārena onaddhā padīpaṃ na gavesatha
translation.text: Why this laughter, why this joy, when the world is ever burning? Shrouded in darkness, will you not seek a light?
